---
title: 'Eudoxus: Characterizing and Accelerating Localization in Autonomous Machines'
author:
- Yiming Gan
- Bo Yu
- Boyuan Tian
- Leimeng Xu
- Wei Hu
- Shaoshan Liu
- Qiang Liu
- Yanjun Zhang
- Jie Tang
- Yuhao Zhu
categories:
- Show All
- Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
topics:
- robotics
url_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/hpca21.pdf
journ: HPCA
year: 2021
contrib: Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
image: featured.png
pub_number: 46
---
